ctxMarket: Attention is on Solana’s liquidity flows and the competitive landscape among blockchains. Despite notable growth in tokenized real-world assets (RWAs) and infrastructure usage, questions remain about defensible advantages between major chains.
ctxTalking:
• Solana’s liquidity is shifting toward RWAs, with Ondo Finance adding 50 tokenized assets.
• Debate over whether any blockchain, including Solana or Ethereum, has a true competitive moat.
• The Solana Foundation president’s claim that crypto gaming is “dead,” despite ongoing brand interest.
ctxMatters:
Solana’s RWA activity signals evolving use cases and new liquidity channels.  
Uncertainty about long-term competitive advantages may influence developer and investor focus.  
Mixed signals from the gaming sector highlight challenges in blockchain adoption beyond finance.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Growth in tokenized asset offerings and continued infrastructure expansion on Solana.
Noise: Broad claims about the end of crypto gaming without supporting adoption data.
ctxGlossary:
RWA — Real-world asset, a physical or traditional asset represented on-chain.
Moat — A sustainable competitive advantage that protects a business from rivals.

readMore.title: Ethereum vs Solana – No chain has defensible ‘moat’ yet, warns Wintermute CEO
Solana Foundation president says crypto gaming is dead
Solana Treasury Forward Industries Uses Loan to Buy Back Shares After 89% Price Dive
